adminNote: A new contact message just arrived through the Forge contact form.

autoReply.subject: Thanks for contacting ProjectCoachAI Forge Edition
autoReply.body:
Hi {{name}},

Thank you for reaching out to ProjectCoachAI Forge Edition.

We’ve received your message and a member of our team will review it shortly.

If your request is related to:

• Product feedback — we read every insight carefully
• Technical support — we’ll reply with guidance as soon as possible
• Feature ideas — these directly help shape Forge’s evolution

You don’t need to do anything else right now — we’ll get back to you soon.

Best regards,
The Forge Team
ProjectCoachAI
